signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.orMagicLink: Or sign in with a magic link

signUp.title: Create Account
signUp.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign In
signUp.checkEmail: Check your email to verify your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

verifyEmail.title: Check Your Email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Click the link to verify your account.
verifyEmail.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

pending.title: Check Your Email
pending.description: We've sent a magic link to your email address. Click the link to sign in.

authError.title: Authentication Error
authError.generic: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again.
authError.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource.
authError.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
authError.oauthFailed: OAuth authentication failed. Please try again.

account.title: Account Settings
account.changeEmailNote: A confirmation email will be sent to your new address.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.deleteConfirmRequired: You must type DELETE to confirm
validation.passwordMustDifferFromCurrent: New password must be different from current password
